article_meta.title: close Video American Accountability Foundation president releases Education Department 'watch list,' explains why Trump

reasoning: The model repeatedly flags quoted/attributed source language as author bias, uses non-standard bias labels, and misses clear author-level bias (e.g., scare quotes/so-called around book bans).
